title: dual JSON scanners (char + byte) are a maintenance trap
description: secretx-core has two complete hand-rolled JSON scanners: a char-level one (json_extract_string_field, json_skip_string, json_skip_container) and a byte-level one (json_find_value_b, skip_string_b, skip_container_b). They duplicate logic and have a comment 'if you update one, update the other'. The char scanner has a known bracket-mismatch bug (documented); the byte scanner fixes it. The char scanner should be removed and callers migrated to the byte scanner.
